entry.title: Perform mass data upload to create Purchase Order - S/4HANA Private
entry.content:
Hello community,

Do any of you know if it's possible to create purchase orders using some kind of mass upload method?
The reason I'm asking is that my POs often contain 50 to 60 SKUs, and manually entering all that data takes a lot of time and increases the risk of errors.

I'm currently working with SAP S/4HANA Private Edition.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Guided Implementation in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Adrian, Thanks for providing the feedback. As of of now there is filter possibility based on a sprint. But i will evaluate it and see if we can have it. 

Regards,
Mustameer Khan
Product Manager - Project and Task Management in SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Enterprise Architect Days of Learning – Architecting Your Future - Calgary
entry.content:
Exclusive Afternoon Learning Events for Enterprise Architects

The role of the Enterprise Architect is evolving — and so must you.

EA Days of Learning — Architecting Your Future (On Tour) is a special series of afternoon events designed to help you grow the skills, mindsets, and network needed for the next generation of Enterprise Architecture leadership.

In a world of constant change — from AI-driven innovation to business model reinvention — the architects who thrive are those who invest in continuous learning, adaptation, and leadership. These sessions are about equipping you not just for today’s challenges, but for tomorrow’s opportunities.

 

What You’ll Gain:

  • Future-Ready Skills: Insights into the capabilities every architect will need
  • Practical Frameworks: Actionable tools to enhance your impact and influence
  • Expert Perspectives: Advice from SAP leaders and seasoned industry practitioners
  • Peer Networking: Connect with others who are shaping the future of Enterprise Architecture
  • Career Acceleration: Clear actions you can take to evolve and lead in your role

Please register here: https://go4.events.sap.com/ca-25-ea-days-of-learning-calgary/en_us/registration.html

entry.title: Re: FSCM CM: Merge Tax - SDCM/MM flow
entry.content: Hello Adriano_Martins, Thank you! Hope you are doing well too! By standard design only non-deductible input tax (EKPO-NAVNW) will be calculated in the MM forecasted amount. Deductible taxes will not be included. But, you can try using the Badi BADI_FQM_FLOW_ADJUST_CORE to add your code.

entry.title: HCM - Payroll Issue
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm facing an issue recently when I try to run a payroll cycle on SAP.
issue message "No entry in table T512W for key EG for time 31.07.2025. I already checked the table and found the wage type exists. Also, I checked the processing class and everything is alright. In addition to checking the MOLGA country grouping and its already configured and linked.

 I tried to search a lot for a reason for this error message but with no answers.

If anyone already faced this issue kindly share the solution with me for urgent reason.

entry.title: Re: Simplified Transportation Document: Two New CT-e Types
entry.content: Does this solution allows to post more than one Good Receipts for 1 Invoice receipt?

entry.title: MD04/MD07 Stock and Receipts days Supply Calculation
entry.content:
Hi,

The question is related to Traffic light in MD04 or MD07.

I have the following picture. Current date is 26.05.2025. MD04:

Needed configuration is following:

As per my understanding for both "Stock Days Supply" and "Receipts Days Supply", we do not have any coverage. Considering current date is 26.05.2025, my expectation is having "-1" for both. 

But why, "Stock Days Supply" = 999,9, and "Receipts Days Supply" = -1 ? At least it should be the same value.

entry.title: Start balance from another version.
entry.content: I would like to create a starting balance for version 101 in May, this value should be the ending balance from version 100 in April.

entry.title: In SuccessFactors PMGM, I would like to hide the old template forms in the Team Overview.
entry.content:
In SuccessFactors PMGM, I would like to hide the old template forms in the Team Overview.

Why? when the manager opens the application and goes in the Team Overview, he will be directed to his last actions and template. However when a new evaluation process starts, we would like that the team overview does not open the old template (all the old forms are terminated) as it is confusing.

Possible to hide old templates? 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Can a customer use their current Qualtrics contract to integrate with SuccessFactors?
entry.content:
Hello,

My customer current has a Qualtrics contract and they now want to integrate it with SuccessFactors. 

Is this possible or do they require a new Qualtrics contract?

Is their any additional fees to them if they can integrate their current contract?

Thanks,

Ken Power

S-CSM

Hi @AndreasMuno 
When more than the 4 attempts are needed there is the possibility to purchase additional attempts via the SAP Certification, two attempts product: SAP Certification | Certification Program
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields Copied Over When Adopt Purchase Requisition to Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi @Yunikean2206 ,

The data transfer for the custom field between PR and PO is most probably done by custom development, and the issue is in the applied logic. Check with you developer how the data transfer was implemented. 

Best regards

entry.title: Determination triggering fields - ABAP RESTful Programming Model (RAP) - Managed scenario
entry.content:
How to Identify Which Field Triggered a Determination?

Let's assume we have defined a determination on modify that triggers when two fields are modified.
An example would be:

determination calculateTotalPrice on modify { update; field BookingFee, CurrencyCode; }

The method FOR DETERMINE ON MODIFY that implements the determination has only the keys of the entities linked to the determination as input.

How can I determine whether the modification was triggered by changes to the BookingFee field or the CurrencyCode field?

 
ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: How to Handle Pre-Arrival Inspection Sheets for Raw Materials in SAP S/4HANA Private Edition?
entry.content:
Hello community,

In our procurement process, one of our main raw materials is steel coils. For these, we create a serial batch to ensure full traceability. However, as an internal practice, we also generate a kind of inspection sheet prior to the material's arrival. This sheet includes all the specifications related to the item and its serial batch, and it’s used by the receiving team to inspect the material when the supplier delivers it.

This document is manually created ahead of time to ensure a smooth and consistent receiving process.

Has anyone implemented something similar in SAP S/4HANA Private Edition?
Is there a way to manage this kind of pre-arrival inspection sheet or checklist directly within SAP?

I’d really appreciate any tips or experiences you can share!

entry.title: Re: French Viewer issue with SP37
entry.content:
Hello Don,

 I have changed some code and now it seem to work. I will need to do some more testing to be sure it did not break anything but at first glance everything seems to be right. I'm adding the Crystal Report Viewer control dynamically and I was setting the culture at the complete end of the Page_Load green comment. If I change it before the creation of the Control that resolve the issue.

Thanks!

entry.title: SAC Import scheduled jobs didn't start at all in a single day schedule
entry.content:
Hello everyone

in a model A, I set up an import job to retrieve information from a sql query.

I scheduled it, as I have done many times, once a day late night, together with other models B, C, D etc : these other models were scheduled before model A.

Normally it works everything fine, but only for a single day, I have seen from the history logs, that this model A didn't start, but B,C,D started fine.

I expected to see some error in the import job history log or something else, but nothing was written about  model A that day.

The next day, the schedule import job worked fine as usual.

Why could it happen? Is there a way to see some advanced logs to understand why this schedule simply was skipped?

Thank you so much for your help

Adriano

entry.title: Re: Maintenance notifications app short dump
entry.content: Did you already check at F2071 - Find Maintenance Notification - for important  OSS notes, installation and configuration steps.

entry.title: Custom field in SAP Hybris Marketing not available in UI adaptation after refreshing the page
entry.content:
We created two new fields in DEV Hybris Marketing (On-premise). They work fine and were published for campaigns via UI adaptation.

Once transferred to Test, we also published them for campaigns via UI adaptation, but when we refresh the page, they disappear and are no longer visible.

The fields are available when we enter UI adaptation. We publish them and then save the changes.

However, they are not visible for use in campaigns if I log out and log in to the campaigns module or refresh the page.

entry.content: Hi Michael, I am also very interested in a workaround or a solution for this problem. BR

entry.content:
Hi ,

Its related to EMW ( Extended Warehouse Management), some warehouse number /activity is missing. You have posted in wrong group. 

Please close this as accepted and raise a new question in EWM group.

 

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: Hi, Is there any hana alternative to SM30 table maintenance ?
entry.content: SM30 still exists in a HANA system. Can you specify (with a tag for example) if you are in an on premise, cloud, private, public version?

entry.title: Re: Alumni Experience- 1H2025 Release
entry.content: We would like some of our "alumni" to have access to apply for internal jobs, is that possible?

entry.title: ODP MODIFY DELTA DATE CLIENT EXTRACTOR
entry.content:
Hello,

Our SAP Transactional system is Netweaver 7.40 and SAP BW 7.5 system; I'm trying to migrate client datasources extractions by function modules with delta revelant date field.

ST-API Datasources use ROOSGENDLM table and it is very useful, sometimes we change "Largest Value Read by Delta Upload" value field to repeat several delta loads  from a past date in one request.

Is there any similar table to ROOSGENDLM in ODP ?

Where could i repeat  several delta loads from a point date in the past in our Z delta extractors extractors ODP?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to resolve "backend error occurred" in SAP GUI for HTML (WebGUI)
entry.content:
Hi @cesarregis, the issue you're facing was resolved in Kernel 785/225

The popup claims about a failed "action/402" and "control not found" which is outlined in the following SAP Note:
-> 3293061 - "Webgui HTML Viewer: backend error with frontend services"

 

All the best,

Lucas

entry.title: Yellow bar to the left of scheduled jobs
entry.content:
Every new job I schedule in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud has a yellow rectangle to the left of it. It cannot be clicked and doesn't appear to be related to the job status as it shows whether the job is in Scheduled, In Process or Completed status. 

I can't find any info on what this means. Why has this started appearing on all my jobs? This occurs in any app where a job can be scheduled.

entry.title: Re: Allocation of Budget - different legal entities on 1...
entry.content:
Hi @Joe0603 

Budget groups is a worst practice design because in case people need to be moved from one group to another during the cycle the administrator has to do it one by one in the admin screen. There is 0 dynamism, it's all set in stone once you've added people in the groups.

Hence it is only valid for customers with a total data freeze during the cycle.

I would encourage you to use budget-grouping feature instead inside Plan Setup > Budgets. And maybe educate the customer to the fact that only budget total can be enforced and not Legal Entity by Legal Entity. If they want to enforce by Legal Entity they will need to create one separate budget for each Legal Entity but then planners will see them all even if they don't have anybody in that legal entity.

 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: crpe32.dll | System.Type.Initialization.Exception
entry.content:
Hi guys, 

currently we are facing on multiple Machines a System.Type.Initialization.Exception when trying to use CR. We use the SP36 in 64-bit. 

The errormessage displays the following:

 Could not load C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Common\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\crpe32.dll

The crpe32.dll is there and the installation was successful, we tried it more than once. Reboot also does not help. 

Any suggestions?

entry.title: Re: Hi, Is there any hana alternative to SM30 table maintenance ?
entry.content: In fact looking for a clean core extensibility option for SM30 for custom table maintenance. This is for private cloud.

entry.title: Unable to assign packaging material type
entry.content:
I created a packaging material using MM01 and selected material type as VERP packaging however, when I'm packing other material in PRDI the system is showing error while giving the packaging material as PKG. Error: PKG is not a packaging material. Please enter a valid packaging material. I also extended the material to EWM using MAT1

The above one is the material created by me. Check the packaging material data.



This is material created by someone else. Packaging material type is populated in this.

Please help, due to this I'm unable to pack the inbound/outbound delivery items in HUs.

@SAPSupport @narayanan_kchandran @Ilina

entry.title: Re: Unable to assign maintenance package in Inspection plan
entry.content: Also check OQ77

entry.title: Re: Hi, Is there any hana alternative to SM30 table maint...

entry.title: Adding Pricing Conditions to an Existing Purchasing Info Record
entry.content:
Hi,

i need to add Pricing Conditions to an Existing Purchasing Info Record.

i try with API POST /A_PurgInfoRecdOrgPlantData(PurchasingInfoRecord="{PurchasingInfoRecord}",PurchasingInfoRecordCategory="{PurchasingInfoRecordCategory}",PurchasingOrganization="{PurchasingOrganization}",Plant="{Plant}")/to_PurInfoRecdPrcgCndnValidity

but it doesn"t work. I receive message "Operation "POST" not supported for entity type "A_PurInfoRecdPrcgCndnValidity"" but at this link https://api.sap.com/api/API_INFORECORD_PROCESS_SRV/path/post_A_PurgInfoRecdOrgPlantData_PurchasingInfoRecord___PurchasingInfoRecord___PurchasingInfoRecordCategory___PurchasingInfoRecordCategory___PurchasingOrganization___PurchasingOrganization___Plant___Plant____to_PurInfoRecdPrcgCndnValidity

there is a documentation about this.

 

i tryed this POST https://my401950.s4hana.cloud.sap:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_INFORECORD_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurgInfoRecdOrgPlantData(PurchasingInfoRecord="5300000070",PurchasingInfoRecordCategory="0",PurchasingOrganization="2310",Plant="2310")/to_PurInfoRecdPrcgCndnValidity 

with this body

{    "ConditionRecord": "0000007208",    "ConditionValidityEndDate": "/Date(1492041600000)/",    "ConditionValidityStartDate": "/Date(1492041600000)/",    "ConditionApplication": "M",    "ConditionType": "PPR0",    "PurchasingOrganization": "2310",    "PurchasingInfoRecordCategory": "0",    "PurchasingInfoRecord": "5300000070",    "Supplier": "1000000",    "Material": "ZTEC_ACQ1",    "Plant": "2310"}

but i doesnt" work.

 

Can you help me?

Riccardo

entry.title: Re: Validation Check for Driver % Summing to 100% by Cost...
entry.content:
Dear @SAC_Newbie09,

you can try something like we use in our Integrated Financial Planning business content:

Create a restricted measure, restrict it to your version and add your additional dimensions, like Country, Channel, Brand, etc as Constant Dimensions.

Then create a calculated measure to divide your driver by the restricted measure.

I hope this helps

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Delivery note deletion
entry.content: I have the same, I have delete the invoice but still "Billing operation already exists for item 1"

entry.title: Can KPRO in S/4 Public Cloud be configured for HTTPS ArchiveLink?
entry.content: can this be configured in CBC for Public Cloud to use Archivelink content servers?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to call destination in template list r...
entry.content: I think you have to create it if you don't have it now.

entry.title: Re: Can KPRO in S/4 Public Cloud be configured for HTTPS...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, ArchiveLink and the use of external content servers (like OpenText) are not configurable directly in the CBC (Central Business Configuration) tool.

However, here’s what you need to know about the topic:

 ArchiveLink in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition:

  • ArchiveLink is traditionally used in on-premise or private cloud environments to link documents stored in external content servers (like OpenText or other certified solutions) to SAP business objects.
  • In Public Cloud, ArchiveLink is not supported as it is in on-premise. Instead, SAP Document Management Service (DMS) via SAP BTP is the recommended approach.

I hope this will help.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: How to work with exemptions using ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud during development in an
entry.content:
Hi @mainak-aich,

1. For using ATC on BTP for on-premise systems the exemption workflow is available since Q4 2023 (not 2019), email notification to approvers is in our development backlog and in process but not yet available.

2. Sure, it is a valid request, thank you for the feedback.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Entry RMEW PTWY does not exist in /SCWM/TACTTY (check...
entry.content:
/SCWM/TACTTY is a Customizing table: activities defined per Warehouse (no access to SE11?)

  • Look in Customizing of 'Extended Warehouse Management' for 'Define Activities for Activity Areas' and 'Assign External Process Step to Warehouse Activity'

entry.title: Re: SAP BODS (Data Services) Correct Stop/ Start Process for Linux and Windows OS
entry.content: We have 2 BODS application servers for Production, and they have been installed on Linux, If i want to stop 2 applications, do I need to stop one after another, or need to be stopped parallelly like first need to be stopped Tomcat in both the applications first, and later job servers need to be stopped in both applications and later SIA in both, and to start obviously we will follow the reverse order. Could you please let me know the process.

entry.title: Re: Hi, Is there any hana alternative to SM30 table maintenance ?
entry.content: So add tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

entry.title: Re: Understanding Joule - (Step #4) Joule Interaction Patterns
entry.content: Very informative and helpful.

entry.title: Re: Hi, Is there any hana alternative to SM30 table maint...
entry.content:
So look for guides/tutorials at Creating Business Configuration Maintenance Object 

e.g.

  • Create an SAP Fiori App for Custom Business Object (SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition) 
  • Custom Business configurations for S/4 HANA 2023 private cloud edition: Some tips & Tricks

entry.title: Re: Can KPRO in S/4 Public Cloud be configured for HTTPS...
entry.content: Thanks for the response! Can Kpro be configured in SAP_com_0597 or something like that? the Archive link service Reps contemplated are not on-Prem but serverless, non-VM truly native cloud services to Azure, GCP or AWS containers, blob stores and sharepoint online.

entry.title: How many IDOC maximum can be passed directly to an Inbound IDOC processing function module
entry.content:
My custom program calls the function module IDOC_INPUT_GLMAST to change G/L Account Master data (transaction code FS00, tables SKA1, SKAT, SKB1). This function module is the one corresponding to the processing of the IDOC type GLMAST01 / message type GLMAST (this can be seen in the transaction code WE57).

The function module is called without a real IDOC, instead I pass a fake IDOC control record and fake IDOC segments (fake IDOC number 1).

It works well if I simulate 1 IDOC, but it fails if calling the function module with 2 IDOC in the parameters. The first one still succeeds but the second one always return the error message FH500 Internal error: Different accounts transferred.

What is the problem?

Sandra

entry.title: Re: How many IDOC maximum can be passed directly to an In...
entry.content:
The problem is that IDOC_INPUT_GLMAST doesn't support receiving more than 1 IDOC at a time in its parameters. This can be seen in the customizing of the transaction BD51:

Only function modules with Input type 0 do support more than 1 IDOC at a time.

Note that the question could have been "how many IDOC maximum can be passed directly to an Inbound IDOC processing function module". It's not guaranteed that function modules with input type 1 or 2 send an error message. The only thing certain is that SAP don't support custom programs which call directly these function modules, they have an unknown behavior if not called in a standard context.

For information, if creating two real IDOC and running them with BD20 and a package size of more than 2 IDOC per package, and if setting a breakpoint in IDOC_INPUT_GLMAST, it can be seen that the function module is called with only one IDOC at a time, because BD20 considers the customizing of BD51.

entry.title: Reimagining Decision-Making: AI as the Catalyst for Unbiased Strategies
entry.content:
Context and Problem

In today’s dynamic business landscape, decisions drive growth, innovation, and transformation. Yet even the most seasoned leaders aren’t immune to cognitive biases(mental shortcuts) or struggle with missing/delayed/overwhelming information which then leads to flawed judgments. From the sunk cost fallacy to conformity bias, from too-limited to too-generic data; unseen forces can result in costly inefficiencies, missed opportunities, and organizational missteps. 

In our recent user research,  >60 professionals' responses were collected via survey designed to explore decision-making patterns within teams at B2B companies. Participants were asked to reflect on their teams’ behaviours in workplace scenarios. These behaviours included relying on heuristics (e.g., availability and anchoring), incorporating probability, reacting to new information, and navigating emotional influences. 

One of the most striking results of our survey is that: 88% people feel that their teams have bias when making decision and roughly 65% feel that relevant data is available only sometimes or rarely.  

Other pain points and needs highlighted frequently were:

  • 'difficulties in gathering data​'
  • 'preference for recommendations tailored to our interests'
  • 'time taken in collaboration between people'
  • '6-8 weeks for decision preparation based on topic and impact​'
  • 'information is often distributed in different places like OneDrive, .pdfs, .docs, excels'
  • 'disconnect of decision need with data often results in missed opportunities and non-impactful decisions'

Qualitative Decision-Making (QDM) Innovation Project :

The Qualitative Decision-Making (QDM) project at SAP Research and Innovation center aims to transform how enterprises make decisions. Designed to augment the work of analysts, QDM empowers employees across functions—from finance to sustainability, production, and procurement—to make informed, researched, data-driven decisions quickly and efficiently. 

  1. We use Generative AI that provides us research, real time information sources, benchmarks, ideas, and analysis of data with reduced emotional or heuristic interference.  AI has strived to provide more impartial recommendations, guide teams toward alternative viewpoints, and even pause decision-making processes to ensure reflection. 
  2. Combine this with company's data in SAP looking over past history, future plans and processes/application/user information to bring decision options that are highly tailored and exclusive to you for a specific decision need.
  3. Final "cherry on top" - we determine the relevant key drivers for each AI generated, company specific decision strategy to simulate the effect of it in real time. 

For example, a Controller and a Supply Chain Specialist can perform risk analysis to mitigate risk of Tarifs imposed on some of their most selling products in the US. Demo of the this was shown by SAP leaders in latest Global Sapphire 2025 Keynote sessions in Orlando: 

And in this example then, for one of the generated mitigation strategy to shift some of the trade in other locations; exact key drivers from the SAP dataset (e.g.;  via SAC model) are identified with default input values that will lead to btter outcome: 

Disclaimer: Features and screens shown here are work in progress by SAP, subject to change and not guaranteed to be part of SAP product portfolio.

Other examples where QDM can be of a great help:

  • Use-case 1: Competitive analysis to consider new strategies for winning against competition.
  • Use-case 2: Pros and Cons of customers credit limits based on data from SAP e.g., account receivable and various credit agency ratings.
  • Use-case 3: Optimize decision making process for selecting manufacturing locations.
  • Use-case 4: Evaluate the most profitable scenario between in-house manufacturing and outsourcing, focused on cost-effectiveness.
  • Use-case 6: Compare options via Pro-Cons analysis to improved sustainability goals such as renewable content based on newly imposed regulatory guidelines.

Closing Remarks:

AI is evolving fast — and it's entering the realm of strategic decision-making. As HBR also showed, it can generate complex business ideas and presentations in 1/100th the time of human teams for decision making.

But the key question remains:
“Can I trust the results — or is it just hallucinating?”

That’s where we come in. By combining your internal SAP data with external unstructured sources using a RAG-based approach, and running LLMs with dynamic prompt engineering securely within your SAP environment, we ensure outcomes are relevant, high-quality, and trustworthy.

The result? Smarter decisions in seconds, powered by your own business logic in SAP.

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Monthly requirement periods in MD62 transaction
entry.content: just go to MD61 or MD62 anc click on user Parameters >> Under Display >> Chose Period Total

entry.title: Invoice List CDS View in S4H Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are developing a report bases on Invoice List ( VF23, VF22, VF21 ) and Related Billing Documennts. 

In SAP Ecc Table VBRL is present which shows Invoice list and Documents.

Is there any CDS view for the same , as we need for Report development.

Regards,

Asesh Kumar

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Monthly requirement periods in MD62 transac...
entry.content:
just go to MD61 or MD62 and click on user Parameters >> Under Display >> Chose Period Total this will solve your problem 

 

Islam Ibrahim

entry.title: Re: Chargeback process with conditional contract management
entry.content: Hi. Can you please change the assigned tags? "SAP Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable" deals with FI-CA. If your question is related to FI, please use either tag „FIN (Finance)“ or "FIN Accounts Receivable and Payable" instead. Thanks and regards

entry.title: Production Order Shows Production Versions without BOM assignment
entry.content:
From my knowledge, Production Versions without BOM assignment cannot be used for creating Production Orders (CO01)

My BOM Application is assigned as the standard "PP01" in Order Type Dependent Parameter Setting (OPL8)

However, when I create a production order, it allows selection of production version without BOM assignment.

I would like to ask if it is standard system behavior to be able to select production version with only routing assigned?

entry.title: Weighted interview questions
entry.content: We are currently implementing the Recruiting module of SuccessFactors. Our current interview scoring process has interviewers rate each question on a 1-6 scale. Questions are then weighted (1-5) depending on their importance to the role to generate the overall score. Eg: If a question has a weighting of 3 and I score someone a 2, they receive 6 points toward the overall score. I understand that SF doesn't not offer this kind of weighting, curious what others who may have used weighted scoring in the past have moved to or how you're handling this need?

entry.title: Re: Unable to assign packaging material type
entry.content:
Hi,

I don't know the situation and configuration in your system, but since you mention PRDO/PRDI am guessing you are using EWM. If you are using EWM you should also maintain the View WM Packaging in the material master and maintain 'Handling Unit Type' and 'Standard HU Type'.

Hope this helps.

Best regards,

Ilina

entry.title: Re: CLM in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Jeroen,

many thanks for your support. the blog answered to almost all my questions... I migrated the assets and now in the same project I want to migrate the contracts. But when I try to migrate the contract the system says that the general rental object (ie. the asset number ref - RECCAP 61) doesn't exists.  Same error if I put a general 0010 as the system does when you manually create the contract.

If I leave it blank, the error says that it is required.

I run out of ideas....

Many thanks again

Best

Arianna

entry.title: Access to Workforce Time via IAS
entry.content:
Hello!

We are looking for ways to link Workforce Software with SAP's Identity Authentication Service (IAS).
Does anyone know of any articles or have they done this internally?

Best regards,
Rhuan Castro.

#IAS #WorkforceTime

entry.title: Issue in UNIT_CONVERSION in CDS View Entity
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to perform unit conversion in CDS view entities in version 75I. So, trying to use unit_conversion, however it ends with SQL code 719.
My CDS view:

Error with execution:

Database returned the SQL code 719. Error text: currency/unit conversion error: search table error: Conversion( "COL$11$" ),
row 0: could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s) 7 from unit 'ST' to unit 'KAR' for client '010'

Both these unit are part of T006 table.

Could you please provide valuable inputs to solve the same.

Regards,

Jhansi

entry.title: Re: Automatic Creation of PO by Goods Receipts
entry.content:
Only NB purchase order type can be used when automatically create purchase order by goods receipt?

How can I change the purchase order type from NB to other customised purchase order type?

entry.title: Re: Missing notification tab in manage work flows for pur...
entry.content: me problem 😞

entry.title: Partner determination in S/4 HANA Cloud TM
entry.content:
Hello TM Experts,

I could not see any config node for partner determination in S/4 HANA Public cloud TM for FO.

How can we add our own custom partner functions in FO ?

How can we copy custom partner functions from Sales order to FO ?

rgds

sachin

entry.title: Re: SAP Table for Budget Report
entry.content: Hi Marico , Thanks for your response . Are you referring this report S_ALR_87013558 or is there any other report available ? I know of another t-code CJI8 but it displays line item wise while I need cumulative figure ? Another doubt in S_ALR_87013558 report is available budget for superior WBS element . Supposing ,available budget at this WBS ( XXXX.01 ) is showing as 10000 USD in report S_ALR_87013558 and available budget at this WBS ( XXXX.01.01) is showing as 2000 USD and same at this WBS ( XXXX.01.01.01) is showing as 3000 USD . In this scenario, how much maximum cost I can post to this WBS element ( XXXX.01 ) . Is it 5000 USD ? If yes , from which report I can find actual available budget for this WBS element ( XXXX.01 ) as S_ALR_87013558 report is confusing for superior WBS element . Please clarify . Thanking you .Mohammed

entry.title: HANA Private Cloud as data source for ETL Ab Initio
entry.content:
I have a data requirement for this ETL. Has anyone had experience or knows if it's possible to connect this ETL to a private HANA Cloud table? My source is HANA Cloud Private, where SAP PaPM is located.
What other ETL tool has a suitable connector to obtain data from the HANA PaPM instance?

entry.title: Re: SAP BDC for Dummies
entry.content: Thanks Binayak

entry.title: Re: Centralize Authorization Management of SAP Cloud ALM Using the Identity Provisioning Service
entry.content:
Hi @MatthiasL 

Agree with you on the notes regarding the use of this solution.

I'd like to use the Corp IDP and provision centrally the groups as we do with the rest of the applications. Do you know if there's any other limitation apart from documentation discouraging from use this approach? I also wonder if local IAS user is mandatory also for this scenario because I may not want to create all corp IDP users in IAS.

entry.title: Re: Certificate C_S4CPB_2502
entry.content: Hi , You have to zoom out the page to 50% and try opening the practice test again.

entry.title: ilodata
entry.content:
please suggest a suitable control to design a table with line items, where each line item has two buttons. When I click on the Issue button, it should display a comment area (refer to the screenshot).

I am using ilodata to view the offline store, but I am encountering the following error.

Could you please help with the following:

  1. How can I delete the offline store?

  2. How can I find the offline store name? If there are any specific queries or commands to retrieve it, please share them.

  3. How should I manage offline stores when working with multiple services, such as DEV and QA environments?

In my case:

  • I initially used the com.app1 service to create the offline database.

  • Now, for a second application, I want to access its offline store using ilodata, but it's throwing an error related to a mismatch in the service root.

Please guide me on the correct approach to manage and switch between different offline stores in such scenarios.

entry.title: Re: When to create my own badi?
entry.content: There is no problem with creating implementation of badii's defined by sap, i want to understand where i can use mine own badi's.

entry.title: How to clear parameter after clicking selective radio button in selection-screen?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Devs,

I was doing my best for coding practice, but I got stuck on one problem, which I was unable to find anywhere. Here's the problem:- The code I was writing in AT SELECTION-SCREEN for screen-input for two parameters, where I executed my code, then I added values to the parameters, and here I am confused. There are two parameters (radius & diameter) and two radio buttons with having same name. When I try to click the radius radio button, the diameter parameter value doesn't clear and vice versa. Below are my code and snapshots.

PLEASE HELP!!! 

Requirement: When I click the radio button, only that parameter value should be taken further, and the other parameter must be cleared.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 how to filter at column level
entry.content: Additional question. I would like to add a search textbox for it. I tried as below but didn't work. Any idea on how to add search feature? new Filter("to_Description/Description", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);

entry.title: Re: 📅 30-Day SAP PP Module Series
entry.content: @vikas1601 please have a look at https://community.sap.com/t5/user/viewprofilepage/user-id/38642

entry.title: Re: Story report - access and filtering
entry.content: Hello @LouLobWB - Please keep in mind, Story report honors Successfactors application granted permission. So the manager whom you want to see summary of the whole business should also see the data in BizX while they navigate to different screens. In other words, managers should have role-based permission access to view the data. With such permission set up, the manager when runs the story report, they will see all the data they have access to. I would recommend to seek help from SuccessFactors RBP expert.

entry.title: Re: Access Performance Forms Directly from SAP SuccessFactors Stories: New in 1H 2025!
entry.content:
Hi @syarif - Scope filters supported only in selected schemas. Regarding the data access, Story honours BizX application permission plus you need to have permission mentioned in the blog above, and then if the manager is able to see the reportee's data in Performance Management module, the same should appear in Story report.

If this doesn't answer, please feel free to share more details.

thanks,
Rajdeep

entry.title: PO reference in Serialization report
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The business requirement is to enter the serial number while creating the purchase order. We have configured the serial profile without equipment and demonstrated how to do this at the PO level. However, when tracking the PO reference in the serialization report IQ09 or IQ03, the PO number is not displayed."

Does this work for you?

Thanks & Regards

Sathyan

entry.title: Re: xsjs 500 internal server error
entry.content: How to enable XSJS debugging

entry.title: Re: New Reporting Permission for Workflow Process Request Data for People Analytics Story Reporting
entry.content: Hi @Blandine_Husser - In such cases, please reach out to the SAP Support team for assistance. Regarding the workflow of deployment, any data model (query design level) or even Story design level change is backward compatible. In case we need customers to mandatorily make changes and adapt to any new pushed changes that may interrupt Story report functionality, it will be well communicated with WNVs and other release channels..

entry.title: Re: SAP, Curiosity & Me — Waldo’s Story
entry.content: Hi !! @OsvaldoLopez, nice to meet you !!! Great summary of your expertice. Feel free to cotact me on linkedin to chat a bit more 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: Example View Plugin not visible in POD Designer
entry.content:
Have you checked the browser Developer Tools console / network tabs for any errors?
Perhaps you are facing CORS error? Have you added your DM host to mta.yaml?

I suggest you check: Standard POD Plugin extensions in SAP Digital Manufacturing and see if it helps.

Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: How to clear parameter after clicking selective radio button in selection-screen?
entry.content: You must debug your code to troubleshoot yourself. See the values of SCREEN-NAME. See, they are never 'pradius' nor 'pdiamet'.

entry.title: Re: When to create my own badi?
entry.content: The title of your question was clear, but then you have lost yourself in unrelated explanations. Clear questions = clear and fast answers. If you want your fellow developers in your company to implement code at given "exit" positions in the future, you define an enhancement option (i.e. CALL BADI) like SAP does for the customers. If you're in a small project with very few people and very little custom code, there is no big reason to define enhancement options.

entry.title: Re: Location Brazil: DC-e (Electronic Content Declaration)
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any news about DC-e (Eletronic Content Declaration)?

The deadline about this issue (Brazil Localization) is until 01/10/2025.

Regards.

entry.title: Interview Scheduling for Mass Recruitment
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently experiencing issues with using the Interview Scheduling tool within the Recruitment module, particularly for mass hiring. After sending out interview invitations, approximately 1/4 of the candidates indicated they received a blank page when clicking the link to book at time slot. Candidates have tried all the typical troubleshooting tips including changing browsers, different devices, cleared cache, etc with no success. We have created a SAP ticket, that has provided no resolution. Any other advice for scheduling interviews in SuccessFactors for 25+ candidates? SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.title: Re: What are the free certification available for Consult...
entry.content: Thank you Margit. This is very useful response from your side

entry.title: Re: Restricting POD page access on Badge ID (Two differen...
entry.content:
Enabling Badge Access on POD pages is designed for shared terminal or shared user environments, allowing the system to accurately track which specific user (via badge) performed each specific action in that POD page. It does not provide any additional levels of authorization or access control by role, it’s meant for user identification and traceability.

Learn more at https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/pod-designer/adding-pages-to-pod and Enable faster user changes and shared terminals using badges in SAP Digital Manufacturing.

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: What are the free certification available for Consult...
entry.content:
Hi @Margit_Wagner,
Thank you so much for the confirmation from your end.
P.S: I was actually about to write to you on the same today!
Best Regards
Arun

entry.title: Re: In SAP DM, Production orders listed in post productio...
entry.content:
By design, Post-Production Reporting POD is meant to work with production/process orders executed in Order POD flow with Autocomplete and Confirm flag as NO and Relaxed Flow flag as YES in the routing/recipe, not in Work Center POD flow, which has different requirements.

Hope it clarifies,
Manoel

entry.title: SAP B1 10.0 Multi-branch Balance Sheets?
entry.content: Is it possible to generate a separate balance sheet for each branch in SAP B1 10.0 in addition to a consolidated balance sheet?

entry.title: Re: How can we update orders via REST api?
entry.content:
Hi Ruud,

As you can see in API Hub, Public APIs for Delete/Update are currently not available, but you can propose new features and improvements anytime via 'Customer Influence' program at https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3537

Using Discard/Complete might be the best way, you can use Custom Data to keep a reference to the parent / original order number, for example.

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Payment Receipt ECP (HRFORM PE51)
entry.content:
Hello!

Currently, I am working on generating the basic payroll receipt from PE51 (HRFORMS).

As a requirement, it is requested that the payroll receipt show the earnings and deductions.I am already doing this with the payroll receipt; however, in addition to this, it is also requested that the accumulation concepts are shown, for example, accumulated savings fund or accumulated savings box.

For example:

 

Would this be possible to do from HRFORMS?

Or given the level of detail in the design, will it be necessary to develop the receipt from SMARTFORMS?

I am clear that one way I can show a specific payroll concept is by searching for the direct concept in the RT table.

We have already implemented this since at the end of the payroll receipt we show the employee's grocery vouchers.

I just want to know if it is possible to show it as requested.Thank you for your support.

entry.title: CDS: How to use @AnalyticsDetails.elimination annotation to eliminate the internal business volume
entry.content:
This blog is about how to use @AnalyticsDetails.elimination to eliminate the internal business volume when executing an analytical query.

Internal business volume

When revenues made between two subsidiaries of company, for company’s total revenue, these revenues should not be considered, as transaction is happening within the company. For example, a company is divided into several subsidiaries. These subsidiaries are divided into further subsidiaries. This means there exists a hierarchy of subsidiaries. Subsidiaries are selling products to each other. For each subsidiary this is external sales. But for a parent subsidiary this is just internal sales, as both subsidiaries are descendants. By using this annotation, revenues made between two subsidiaries in an organization are no longer displayed.

More information about the concept can be found Elimination of Internal Business Volume | SAP Help Portal

Syntax

elimination: {

     pair : array of {

       dimension1: String(30);

       dimension2: String(30);

     }

     rule : String(20) enum { ELIMINATE_IF_ALL; ELIMINATE_IF_ONE; };

   }

The annotation can be used in cube-views (Analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE) or in analytical queries (define transient view entity with provider contract analytical query).

  • pair: this list defines the pairs (dimension1 and dimension2) which are checked for elimination. Both dimensions have needed a foreign key association to the same target view. If the annotation is used on cube level, both dimensions must be elements of the cube. If the annotation is used in an analytical query, both dimensions must be part of the source cube view.
  • rule: if set to #ELIMINATE_IF_ALL, then the volume is eliminated if all pairs are internal. If set to #ELIMINATE_IF_ONE the volume is eliminated if at least one pair is internal. If "rule" is not set, the AND-logic (ELIMINATE_IF_ALL) is applied.

Example 

Following example displays the number of seat booked in flight according to the elimination rule specified on destination airport, departure airport, destination country, departure country.

 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_ALLOWED
@EndUserText.label: 'Elimination of Internal Busniess volumn'
@ObjectModel.modelingPattern: #ANALYTICAL_QUERY
@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities: [#ANALYTICAL_QUERY]
define transient view entity ZLR_PC_FLIGHTICE_SIMPLE
  provider contract analytical_query
  as projection on ZOQ_FLIGHT_ICE
{

  _airportfrom._hier( p_HierarchyID : 'GEO' ) as _airportFromHier,
  @Consumption.hidden: true
  _airportfrom.AirportID                      as dummyAirportFrom,


  _airportto._hier( p_HierarchyID : 'GEO' )   as _airportToHier,
  @Consumption.hidden: true
  _airportto.AirportID                        as dummyAirportTo,
  
  @AnalyticsDetails.query: {
    axis: #ROWS,
    displayHierarchy: #ON,
    hierarchyAssociation: '_airportFromHier'
  }
  
  airportfrom,
  
  @AnalyticsDetails.query: {
    axis: #ROWS,
    displayHierarchy: #ON,
    hierarchyAssociation: '_airportToHier'
  }
  airportto,

  @Consumption.filter.defaultValue: 'DE'
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
  countryfrom,

  @AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
  countryto,

  seatsmax,



  @AnalyticsDetails.elimination: {
    pair: [{ dimension1 : 'countryfrom' , dimension2: 'countryto' }]
  }
  @EndUserText.label: 'SeatsMax Q-ICE country'
  seatsmax                                    as seatsmaxICEQ_C,


  @AnalyticsDetails.elimination:{
    pair: [ { dimension1 : 'airportfrom' , dimension2: 'airportto' },
            { dimension1 : 'countryfrom' , dimension2: 'countryto' } ],
    rule: #ELIMINATE_IF_ALL
  }
  @EndUserText.label: 'SeatsMax Q-ICE airport and country'
  seatsmax                                    as seatsmaxICEQ_AC,


  @AnalyticsDetails.elimination:{
    pair: [ { dimension1 : 'airportfrom' , dimension2: 'airportto' },
            { dimension1 : 'countryfrom' , dimension2: 'countryto' } ],
    rule: #ELIMINATE_IF_ONE
  }
  @EndUserText.label: 'SeatsMax Q-ICE airport or country'
  seatsmax                                    as seatsmaxICEQ_A_C


}

 

Output

 

In this example for columns (cells marked with colour): 

SeatsMax Q-ICE country – elimination pair mentioned as 'countryfrom' and 'countryto'. Therefore, there is no entry where departure country and destination country are same.

SeatsMax Q-ICE airport and country- elimination pairs are 'airportfrom' and 'airportto', 'countryfrom' and 'countryto' And rule as #ELIMINATE_IF_ALL, Therefore, there is no entry where destination airport and departure airport are same AND destination country and departure country are same.

SeatsMax Q-ICE airport or country - elimination pairs are 'airportfrom' and 'airportto', 'countryfrom' and 'countryto' And rule as #ELIMINATE_IF_ONE, Therefore, there is no entry where destination airport and departure airport are same OR destination country and departure country are same.

 

Constraints

The annotation can be used in cubes or in queries.

  • The dimension names in one pair (AnalyticsDetails.elimination.pair) must have a foreign key association to the same dimension view and this dimension view must have an hierarchy association.
  • In the query definition:
    • It is not necessary that any of the dimensions in the list of pairs is part of the query
    • If a hierarchy is assigned to a dimension, then the pair dimension must be assigned to the same hierarchy or must be without hierarchy
    • If a dimension is not in drill down, then the condition of the one pair is always true (independent of the value of the other dimension of the pair). The same is true on totals/subtotal lines.

entry.title: Re: Schedule Order standard service in DMC
entry.content:
It seems that operation schedules are missing in the updated routing, so system can´t schedule them. I suggest you raise a ticket for further investigation and proper support of your specific case.

Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi,

There is very limited information available, but I have the feeling that a planned batch might be missing in your order header, which is normally generated in S/4 and sent to DM via Order Download, and used during Goods Receipt posting.

Double check and make sure a planned batch is defined in Goods Receipt tab of your order in ERP and shows up in Manage Orders app header at 'batch' field and try again.

Otherwise, you might need to raise a ticket for further investigation and proper support.

Hope it helps!
Manoel

entry.title: Introducing the Canada ERP Localization Work Zone
entry.content:
We are excited to announce the launch of our brand-new Work Zone dedicated to Canada ERP Localization. This dedicated space aims to bring together relevant information and resources, making it easier for our customers to find what they need.

What to Expect in the Work Zone

  • Centralized Content Repository

Our primary objective is to offer a centralized, comprehensive resource hub for Canada ERP Localization. In our content repository, you'll discover essential files, including those pertaining to Canada DRC reports.

  • Active Engagement through the Forum

One of our key objectives is to foster a collaborative environment where we can hear directly from our customers. We have introduced a "Forum" section where customers can actively participate. Our first discussion topic is: "Which content would you like to see added to this Work Zone?" We are eager to hear your responses so that we can continue building this Work Zone with valuable insights that benefit your businesses.

  • Related Links and FAQs

We have also included a section with related links and frequently asked questions (FAQs). This will help you quickly find answers to common queries and access additional resources.

How to Join the Work Zone

To request access to this private Work Zone Group, please follow these steps:

  1. Open the Workspace link: Canada — Enterprise Resource Planning Localization
  2. Click the "Request to Join" button.
  3. Use your work email to submit the request.
  4. Include your company name, your full name, and your role in the comment section.

Existing Support Procedure for SAP Products Remains in Place

Please be reminded that if you experience any difficulties or need assistance with an SAP product, you should continue to follow the standard procedure of creating an incident via ServiceNow.

Join the Conversation

We look forward to your active participation in our Work Zone. Together, we can build a robust and valuable resource that meets the needs of our Canadian customers.

Access the Work Zone here: Canada — Enterprise Resource Planning Localization

Together, let's make the Canada ERP Localization Work Zone a vibrant hub of information and collaboration.

entry.title: How to get material group description, not its key, in a CDS View?
entry.content:
Material group description is required in the PO smart form, and we don’t find any CDS for the material Group Description.
The requirement is how we can find the Material group description concerning the material group.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to get material group description, not its key, i...
entry.content:
Hi there,

You can use the "I_ProductGroupText_2" datasource, it has ProductGroupText name field, which is the Product Group Description.

PS.: Product and material are basically the same thing.

You can retrieve this data with "API_PRODUCTGROUP_2" too! Its documentation is available at Product Group Data - Read | Business Accelerator Hub

Hope this helps you out!

Kind regards,
Ícaro
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: In SAP DM, Production orders listed in post productio...
entry.content: Hi Manoel, thanks for your response. So in summary, post production reporting pod and workcebter pod cannot be used simultaneously. Is my understanding right
